---
title: "Frances Ann E. Ewan"
---

## Frances Ann E. Ewan

**Dates:** (1870-1965)

### Description

illustrator

### Biography

She joined the St. Ives colony of artists during the First World War, and a painting is owned by Penlee House Museum.

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 29th [1901]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
